zh.lifeSummary: 當Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV於1110年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟時，他的父親Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun31歲，母親Havoise de Mondoubleau25歲。他於大約1135年與Marguerite de Saint-Calais在法國崔洛易-吉黑結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1180年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV于1110年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉波奧瑟时，他的父亲Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun31岁，母亲Havoise de Mondoubleau25岁。他于大约1135年与Marguerite de Saint-Calais在法国崔洛易-吉黑结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1180年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV was born in 1110, in Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun, was 31 and his mother, Havoise de Mondoubleau, was 25. He married Marguerite de Saint-Calais about 1135, in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1180, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV est né en 1110, à Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Havoise de Mondoubleau, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Saint-Calais environ 1135, à Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1180, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV 1110 in Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun 31 und seine Mutter Havoise de Mondoubleau 25. Er hat um 1135 in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Marguerite de Saint-Calais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1180 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV è nato il nel 1110 nel Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Havoise de Mondoubleau, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Saint-Calais circa 1135, nel Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1180, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IVが1110年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインビーウクeで生まれた時，父Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudunは31歳，母Havoise de Mondoubleauは25歳であった。約1135年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーでMarguerite de Saint-Calaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1180年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV(이)가 1110년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 보ce에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoise de Mondoubleau(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1135년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처에서 Marguerite de Saint-Calais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV nasceu em 1110, em Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Havoise de Mondoubleau, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Saint-Calais aproximadamente 1135, em Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1180, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV родился в 1110 г. в местности бокe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Havoise de Mondoubleau, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Saint-Calais около 1135 г. в местности лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1180 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV nació en 1110, en Beaucé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey III Viscount of Châteaudun, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Havoise de Mondoubleau, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Saint-Calais aproximadamente 1135, en Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1180, a la edad de 70 años.
